Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Sep-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David L. Barch of Santana Vierra & Symonds (415-777-1308) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party, EJ Stavick

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT EJ STAVICK'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint, to strike the punitive damages allegations against him is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party must submit a [proposed] written order tracking the Court's ruling, verbatim.
